resources.string:
🔮 Welcome to ArcaneChat✨

To get in contact with friends:

🤳🏻 Tap "QR code" on the main screen of both devices. Choose "Scan QR Code" on one device, and point it at the other

🔗 If not in the same room, you can share your invite link from "Invite friends" in the menu

📢 Join the [Official ArcaneChat Channel](%1$s) to keep updated about the development status.

🔮 What's new?

★ Target Android 16

★ Improve edge-to-edge support

★ Change color of links in text messages

★ Metadata protection: protect message recipients

★ Fix: avoid freezing in background

★ Improve handling of video recoding

★ Several other fixes and small improvements


💜 Please donate to help us remain independent and continue to bring improvements: %1$s
